name: HMAC-SHA256 from scratch
task: Create /tmp/eval_hmsc/hmsc.py with hmac_sha256_scratch(key, message) returning the HMAC-SHA256 hex digest WITHOUT using the hmac module (only hashlib.sha256 is allowed). Implement RFC 2104: if len(key) > 64, set key = sha256(key); pad to 64 bytes; compute sha256(opad || sha256(ipad || message)).

validation.script: import importlib.util,hashlib,hmac; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_hmsc/hmsc.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); msg = b'The quick brown fox'; key = b'secret_key'; e = hmac.new(key, msg, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest(); a = mod.hmac_sha256_scratch(key, msg); assert e == a, f'{e} vs {a}'; long_key = b'x'*100; e2 = hmac.new(long_key, msg, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest(); a2 = mod.hmac_sha256_scratch(long_key, msg); assert e2 == a2; print('OK')
